title: CVS to cut about 5,000 corporate jobs: report
text: CVS Health Corp. will slash about 5,000 jobs in a cost-cutting move, the Wall Street Journal reported Monday night. According to the report, the layoffs are primarily in corporate positions, and the company doesn't expect customer-facing positions in its stores, clinics and pharmacies to be affected.

title: CVS Health: Undervalued Long-Term Gem
text: CVS Health is trading at a significant discount, with its price-to-earnings valuation below its five-year average. CVS Health has diversified away from being a brick-and-mortar retailer, acquiring Aetna, Signify Health and Oak Street Health, which has not yet been fully recognized by investors. Despite an expected EPS decline of just over 1% in 2023, I believe CVS is undervalued with high financial flexibility and steady cash flow, making it a recommended long-term hold.

title: Our Dividend Growth Portfolio Continues To Outpace The S&P 500

The portfolio was designed to provide greater protection during recessions and severe bear markets, and began to pull away from the S&P 500 after the world changed in 2020. title: CVS Health: A Portfolio Must Have
text: CVS, originally a convenience store, is now a diversified health solutions company, operating in Health Care Benefits, Health Services, and Pharmacy & Consumer Wellness segments. Despite underperforming the broader stock market YTD, it now offers an attractive entry point and it is well-positioned to outperform in the next 12-18 months. CVS faces challenges such as e-commerce competition, legislative pressure on its PBM business, and high leverage, but its vertical integration with Aetna and potential for digital transformation could provide future growth.

title: GoodRx shares gain on new prescription-drug discount program with CVS
text: GoodRx GDRX, -1.64% shares gained 3.5% premarket on Wednesday after the drug-savings app provider and CVS Health CVS, +2.75% announced a new program to lower out-of-pocket prescription drug costs for CVS Caremark clients' members. CVS Caremark eligible members will have automatic access to GoodRx prescription pricing, potentially generating savings on generic medications at the pharmacy counter, the companies said in a release Wednesday.

title: CVS Health: Improved Upside And Yield After The Steep Sell-Off
text: CVS has been overly normalized to its pre-pandemic levels, despite the sustained expansion in its businesses and top-line. While profitability continues to be impacted, the headwinds are only temporary, with its liquidity and balance sheet remaining robust. Its dividends are still safe as well, with these depressed levels offering an improved forward dividend yield of 3.52%.
